mapper.select: /* StaLineMapper.selectStaLine - site_sta_line 단일행 조회 */ SELECT site_cd AS siteCd, direction_cd AS directionCd, line_json AS lineJson, version AS version, sta_offset_km AS staOffsetKm FROM site_sta_line WHERE site_cd = #{siteCd} AND direction_cd = #{directionCd} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1

/* StaLineMapper.selectStaLinesByParent - 대표 siteCd 기준 하위 노선 라인들 조회 */ SELECT l.site_cd AS siteCd, l.direction_cd AS directionCd, l.seg_no AS segNo, l.line_json AS lineJson, l.version AS version, l.sta_offset_km AS staOffsetKm, l.sta_base_km AS staBaseKm, s.site_name AS siteName FROM site_sta_line l JOIN site_info s ON s.site_cd = l.site_cd WHERE l.use_yn = 'Y' AND s.del_yn = 'N' AND l.direction_cd = #{directionCd} AND s.parent_site_cd = #{parentSiteCd}

SELECT site_cd AS siteCd, direction_cd AS directionCd, seg_no AS segNo, line_json AS lineJson, version AS version, sta_base_km AS staBaseKm, sta_offset_km AS staOffsetKm FROM site_sta_line WHERE site_cd = #{siteCd} AND direction_cd = #{directionCd} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY seg_no ASC
